claim: VERDICT: route PROVEN. End-to-end chain works from a fresh session in <2 minutes. Steps and citations: (1) `python -m tools.debugger audit` exits 0 with `gap_action: boss_wrong_switch_replay_materialization` and proof command `python -m tools.debugger investigate --symptom "boss selected wrong switch"` (tools/debugger/__main__.py audit surface). (2) `investigate` ran cleanly, wrote .local/tmp/debugger_investigate_wrong_switch.json (timeline=76, graph=49, valid=True), Top proof commands #1 = `python -m tools.boss_ai_debugger rom-switch-materialize --scenarios <scenarios.jsonl> --fail-on-mismatch (needs-input)`. (3) `tools/boss_ai_debugger/rom_switch_materialize.py:30` declares `SUPPORTED_FAMILIES = ("switch_sack",)`; line :171 skips other families with reason 'unsupported scenario family'. (4) Filtered 3 switch_sack scenarios out of `.local/tmp/boss_ai_debugger/all_seed1_120_after_mirror_fix.jsonl` (54 total switch_sack scenarios in that file) into .local/tmp/wrong_switch_three.jsonl. (5) Ran `python -m tools.boss_ai_debugger rom-switch-materialize --scenarios .local/tmp/wrong_switch_three.jsonl --limit 3 --json-out .local/tmp/wrong_switch_three_result.json --fail-on-mismatch` → scenarios=3 checked=3 skipped=0 errors=0 policy_disagreements=1, base_route=shared_switch_loop, base_state=.local/tmp/boss_state_factory/shared_switch_loop_frame_200.state, rate=616/min, exit_code=1. Disputed scenario: `generated_switch_sack_1_00002_stay_when_current_move_converts` (expected_switch=False, proposed_switch=True, confidence=57; policy.why='Do not switch or cash out when the current active move is already the converter.'; best=move_route_damage; bad=move_cashout; switch option=move_safe_switch; policy_tags=[active_pressure, switching, converter]; evidence_refs=[docs/pokemon_mastery/policy_cards/active_pressure_before_status.md, docs/pokemon_mastery/heuristic_core/converter_before_script.md]). RESULT: bounded objective satisfied — proof route detects disputes and exits 1 on --fail-on-mismatch with one concrete switch_sack disagreement against a policy-card-backed expectation. Whether this scenario is also a real boss AI bug vs a stale-expectation case is a separate investigation, not Codex's named bounded objective. Proposing mutual_done on this slice and asking Codex which next lane to take (a) declare PROVEN, write up audit/omni_debugger_first_gap_action_proof_2026-05-24.md and commit, (b) treat the disputed scenario as a new investigation slice, or (c) something else.
